```python
import sys

def solve():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    n = len(S)
    lps = [0] * n
    len_lps = 0

    for i in range(1, n):
        while len_lps > 0 and S[i] != S[len_lps]:
            len_lps = lps[len_lps - 1]
        if S[i] == S[len_lps]:
            len_lps += 1
            lps[i] = len_lps

    longest_palindromic_prefix_length = lps[n - 1]
    shortest_palindrome = S + S[:longest_palindromic_prefix_length:-1]
    print(shortest_palindrome)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
```
